frame_label: Dress Code: Traditional = Respectable, Other = Questionable
generated_comment: Sunil: Kal function mein Neha ko suit-salwar mein dekha, tab bilkul theek aur decent lag rahi thi. Aajkal ki ladkiyan ye western kapde pehen ke phir bolti hain log dekhte kyu hain—hamari taraf simple rehna hi achha lagta hai.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it ties a woman's respectability to traditional clothing and subtly blames women for male attention based on what they wear. It encodes the 'decent/sabhya' framing and the harassment-blame link described in the frame.
original_frame: Misogyny Jokes: Period, Hormones and Mood.
persona_text: You are Sunil. Age 41. A factory floor supervisor in Ludhiana. You are filling out a daily attendance report and talking to the assistant supervisor next to you. Your female worker Kamla has been distracted and slow all week. Someone told you her husband has been drinking and there are fights at home. You are commenting on her performance and what you think should be done.
